source_description: Replace Symfony Console with a Waaseyaa-native CLI runtime end-to-end. Hard-cut migration: every shipped Symfony Console command is ported in this mission, symfony/console runtime dep is dropped from packages/cli, bin/waaseyaa rewires onto the native kernel, CommandTester is replaced by a native CliTester, and docs/specs/cli-kernel.md is added with operator-diagnostics cross-refs updated.
